## beehiiv subscription-tags create

Add subscription tag

### Synopsis

Add subscription tag

Adds tags to a subscription. If the tag does not exist on the publication, it will be created automatically.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tags

```
beehiiv subscription-tags create <subscriptionId> [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --body string         Provide a request body as inline JSON, @path, or - for stdin
  -h, --help                help for create
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
